name: Caperton v. A. T. Massey Coal Co.
question: Did Justice Brent Benjamin's failure to recuse himself from participation in a case where one of the parties donated $3 million to his election campaign violate the Due Process Clause of the 14th Amendment?
description: A case in which the Court held that the Due Process Clause of the 14th Amendment required that a justice recuse himself from a case if one of the parties in the suit donated $3 million to the justice's election campaign.
